---
#Titre de la page à afficher
title: "Welcome to my website !"
#Image à afficher
image: "images/me_round.png"
#Liens utiles
links:
    #CV
  - label: "CV"
    url: "links/cv.pdf"
    #Linkedin
  - label: '<i class="fab fa-linkedin fa-lg"></i>'
    url: "https://www.linkedin.com/in/bellier-benjamin/"
    #Github
  - label: '<i class="fab fa-github fa-lg"></i>'
    url: "https://github.com/bbellier"
    #Google scholar
  - label: "GS"
    url: "https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=GjNCJe0AAAAJ&hl=fr"
    #Researchgate
  - label: "RG"
    url: "https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Benjamin-Bellier"
    #orcID
  - label: "ID"
    url: "https://orcid.org/0009-0006-6863-241X"
#Sortie
output:
  #Utilisation du template "trestles" du package "postcards"
  postcards::trestles
#Article distill
site: distill::distill_website
---

This website is under construction..
